title: DO NOT MERGE: Vendor mtrmac/image:mpg-fixes
body:
To make testing of https://github.com/containers/image/pull/586 easier.

(https://github.com/containers/image/pull/586 does not add any new dependencies, so this is not strictly necessary.)

comments.body: @mtrmac Since the referenced PR has been merged, I am closing this PR. Reopen if I am mistaken.
